name: Albondigas (Spanish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix pork, beef, egg, rice, half of onion, and thyme together; form into small balls.
2. Bring water to a boil in a large pot. Add the meatballs and simmer on low heat for 1 hour.
3. Add chopped tomato, garlic, chili, and remaining diced onion; let simmer for an additional 35 minutes.
4. Add yerba buena sprigs and simmer for another 10 minutes.
5. Soak French bread in a small amount of soup broth until very soft. Remove from broth and blend with cumin.
6. Chop the blended mixture together with the vegetables (carrots and peas).
7. Simmer until all vegetables are tender. Serve.
Note: The original recipe text contained some inconsistencies and unclear instructions, which have been addressed in this rewritten version for clarity and consistency.
